<script nonce="">
(function(){
function appendScriptFunction() {
var script = document.createElement('script');
script.nonce = 'Tj2pDlJTJC2rDyq';
script.src = 'https://d8c14d4960ca.edge.sdk.awswaf.com/d8c14d4960ca/a18a4859af9c/challenge.js';
script.type = "text/javascript";
script.async = true;
window.awsWafCookieDomainList = ['booking.com']
document.head.appendChild(script);
};
function addToWindowLoad(f) {
if (window.addEventListener) {
window.addEventListener('load', f);
} else if (window.attachEvent) { // support older IE versions
window.attachEvent('onload', f);
} else {
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', f); // final fallback
}
}
addToWindowLoad(function(e) {
setTimeout(appendScriptFunction, 1000);
});
})();
</script>

                    #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-optout-signal

                        color: #1a1a1a;
                    }

                    #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk a[href] font,
                    #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-link-btn
                        {
                            color: #006ce4;
                        }#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler,
                         #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {
                            background-color: #006ce4;border-color: #006ce4;
                color: #FFFFFF;
            }
            #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk *:focus,
            #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk:focus {
               outline-color: #000000;
               outline-width: 1px;
            }
            #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler,

    max-width: 165px;
}
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-banner-sdk {
    font-family: BlinkMacSystemFont, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica,
    Arial, sans-serif;
    background-color: #f7f7f7;
    padding: 16px;
    border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
    padding-bottom: 22px;
}

/*Replicates .bui-banner__title*/
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.5em;
    margin: 0;
    padding-right: 32px;
    color: #383838;
    display: inline-flex;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk .ot-sdk-row {
    display: flex;
    max-width: 1100px;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0px auto;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-group-container {
    line-height: 26px;
    max-width: 948px;
    margin-right: 32px;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
    margin-left: 0;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    position: relative !important;
    top: auto;
    left: auto;
    transform: none;
    text-align: center;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk[dir="rtl"] #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    position: static !important;
}
#onetrust-banner-sdk[dir="rtl"] #onetrust-group-container {
    margin-right: 0 !important;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    position: static;
    top: auto;
    left: auto;
    transform: none;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
    flex-direction: column;
    display: flex;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button {
    margin-top: unset;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button:focus {
    outline: none;
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #f7f7f7,0 0 0 4px #006ce4;
}


#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
    display: none;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text {
    margin: 8px 0 0;
    line-height: 26px;
    color: #383838;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 400;
}

/*BUTTON GROUP*/
#onetrust-button-group {
    float: right;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
    display: none;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link {
    display: inline-block;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    min-width: auto;
    background: none;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2) #onetrust-group-container {
    width: auto;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler:focus, #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler:focus {
    opacity: 1;
    outline: none;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler {
    margin-bottom: 5px !important;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 1280px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2).vertical-align-content
    #onetrust-button-group-parent {
        position: initial;
        left: 0;
        padding-left: 0;
    }
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 550px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns,
    #onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns,
    #ot-sdk-cookie-policy .ot-sdk-three.ot-sdk-columns {
        width: 100%;
    }
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 1024px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent {
        width: 100%;
    }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 768px) {
    #onetrust-banner-sdk.vertical-align-content #onetrust-button-group-parent {
        position: fixed !important;
        bottom: 0;
        left: 0;
        width: 100%;
        max-width: none;
    }

    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
        display: flex;
        align-items: baseline;
        flex-direction: unset;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        margin-bottom: 5px;
    }

    #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler.cookie-setting-link { display: contents; display: block; }

    #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text {
        margin: 8px 0 48px;
        line-height: 20px;
    }

    #onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-group-container {
        margin-right: unset;
    }

    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group #onetrust-reject-all-handler {
        margin: 0 14px;
    }

    #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group button {
        flex-grow: 1;
        width: auto;
    }
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a {
    color: #0a75c2 !important;
    cursor: pointer;
    margin-left: 0;
    font-weight: normal !important;
}
#onetrust-pc-sdk .ot-title-cntr {
    width: 100% !important;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text {
    max-height: 140px;
    overflow-y: auto;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text::-webkit-scrollbar {
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    width: 7px;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-policy-text::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
    border-radius: 4px;
    background-color: rgba(0,0,0,.5);
    -webkit-box-shadow: 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.5);
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk button.ot-cookie-manage-settings {
    color: #0a75c2 !important;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-weight: normal !important;
    padding: 0;
    margin: 0;
    text-decoration: underline;
    border: none;
    outline: none;
    height: inherit;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group .cookie-setting-link {
    order: 3 !important;
    min-width: 125px;
    flex-basis: 100%;
}

<div class="bui-grid__column bui-grid__column-3">
<style>
/*
I know it's ugly and shouldn't be done like this.
The reason for inlining this styles, is that I want to include them only for the experiment,
as well as for booking owned websites.
Also, these components that are used here should be migrated to Capla within this year timespan.
So this is temporary change, and I know that there is nothing more permanent than temporary.
*/
.hp-sidebar--right {
display: flex;
flex-direction: column;
height: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews {
margin-bottom: var(--bui_spacing_4x);
overflow: hidden;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .hp-gallery-review {
position: initial;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews #reviewFloater {
float: none;
padding: 0;
width: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews #reviewFloater .featured_review_score,
.hp-sidebar__reviews .external_reviews_popover {
float: none;
margin-bottom: 0;
padding: var(--bui_spacing_3x);
width: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .external_reviews_popover {
width: auto;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .featured_review_score .big_review_score_detailed {
clear: initial;
float: none;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .reviews-carousel {
width: 100%;
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .best-review-score {
margin: 0;
padding: var(--bui_spacing_3x);
}
.hp-sidebar__reviews .best-review-score.inferred-location-score {
margin: 0;
padding: 0;
}
.hp-sidebar__map {
flex: 1;
height: auto;
overflow: hidden;
}
</style>
<div class="hp-sidebar--right">
<div class="hp-sidebar__reviews bui-box bui-box--border-color-neutral_alt bui-box--border-radius-100 bui-box--border-width-100 bui-box--padding-none">

<div data-capla-component-boundary="b-property-web-property-page/PropertyQAActiveBooking" data-capla-hydration="0"></div>
<div class="page-section hp--desc_highlights js-k2-hp--block">
<div class="bui-grid">
<div class="bui-grid__column bui-grid__column-8 k2-hp--description">
<div class="hp-description" data-et-view="goal:hp_property_description_seen">
<div class="hp_desc_main_content">
<div data-capla-component-boundary="b-property-web-property-page/PropertyDescriptionDesktop" data-capla-hydration="0"><div class="c3bdfd4ac2" style="--bui_box_spaced_padding--s: 0;"><h3 class="e7addce19e f531cf0753">Experience world-class service at Grace Bay Club</h3><div></div><div></div><p data-testid="property-description" class="b99b6ef58f f1152bae71">This impressive resort is located on Grace Bay Beach, on Providenciales, part of the Turks and Caicos Islands. It offers an extensive spa, 3 outdoor pools and a private beach area.

The stylish, air-conditioned suites at Grace Bay Club feature free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV, DVD player and iPod docking station. Each one has a private terrace with ocean views.

The resort features  Infiniti Restaurant &amp; Raw Bar, where guests enjoy fine dining on dishes with fresh, local ingredients, while The Grill and Krave Restaurants offer international dishes in an informal environment. There is also a pool bar and an infinity bar which stretches right to the ocean.

The Anani Spa offers a range of fitness and massage treatments. There is also a fitness centre and tennis courts. For children there is the Kids’ Town, which offers entertainment, arts and crafts.

There is a golf course just 2 minutes’ drive from Grace Bay Club, and the nearby beaches are great for scuba diving and other water sports. Providenciales Airport is 12 minutes’ drive away.

</p><p data-testid="property-description-location-score-trans" class="">Couples particularly like the location — they rated it <b>10.0</b> for a two-person trip.</p><p data-testid="PropertyDescriptionOsmDisclaimer" class="fff1944c52 fb14de7f14">Distance in property description is calculated using © OpenStreetMap</p></div></div>
</div>
<div data-et-view="bNXGDJdLTLScXQOVWe:1"></div>
</div>

<script nonce="">
;(function() {
'use strict';
if(document && document.addEventListener && document.querySelectorAll) {
var BUTTON_SELECTOR = '.book_now_button_handler';
var reserveButtons = document.querySelectorAll(BUTTON_SELECTOR);
reserveButtons = Array.prototype.slice.call(reserveButtons);
if(reserveButtons && reserveButtons.length) {
reserveButtons.forEach(function(button) {
button.addEventListener('click', goToAvailabilityBlock);
});
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
reserveButtons.forEach(function(button) {
button.removeEventListener('click', goToAvailabilityBlock);
});
});
}
}
function goToAvailabilityBlock() {
if(window.history && window.history.replaceState) {
var uri = window.location.toString();
if (uri.indexOf("#") > 0) {
var uriWithoutHash = uri.substring(0, uri.indexOf("#"));
window.history.replaceState({}, document.title, uriWithoutHash);
}
}
var RT_SELECTOR = '.hp-section-header';
var roomsTable = document.querySelector(RT_SELECTOR);
if(roomsTable) {
window.scrollTo(0, roomsTable.offsetTop);
}
}
})();
</script>
</div>

f728e61e72 d0acd69e66 c256f1a28a" style="--bui_box_spaced_padding--s: 4;"><div class="c85a1d1c49"><p>Guests are required to show a photo identification and credit card upon check-in. Please note that all Special Requests are subject to availability and additional charges may apply.</p><p>Please inform Grace Bay Club in advance of your expected arrival time. You can use the Special Requests box when booking, or contact the property directly with the contact details provided in your confirmation.</p><p>In response to Coronavirus (COVID-19), additional safety and sanitation measures are in effect at this property.</p></div></div></div></div></section></div></div><div class="page-section js-k2-hp--block k2-hp--cpc_regulation"><div><h2 class="e4350dc417">Legal information</h2><div class="a7c8ca5e60">This property is managed, licensed or represented by a business. This label has no relevance in terms of tax, including VAT and other 'indirect taxes', but is required under applicable consumer laws. You can find more information about the business here:&nbsp;<button data-testid="trader-information-modal-button" type="button" class="de576f5064 bef8628e61 ebe14db8fe e0d8514d4d"><span>See business details</span></button>.</div></div></div></div></div></div>

Breakfast option(s) include: </p><ul class="dd2232e8aa"><li>Continental</li><li>Vegetarian</li><li>Gluten-free</li><li>American</li><li>Buffet</li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rcf:" id=":rce:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">Does Grace Bay Club have a pool?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rce:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcf:"><div id="content-2" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Yes, this hotel has a pool. class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rci:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcj:"><div id="content-4" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Check-in at Grace Bay Club is from 15:00, and check-out is until 11:00.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rcl:" id=":rck:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">How much does it cost to stay at Grace Bay Club?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rck:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcl:"><div id="content-5" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>The prices at Grace Bay Club may vary depending on your stay (e.g. dates you select, hotel's policy etc.). See the prices by entering your dates.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rcn:" id=":rcm:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">Does Grace Bay Club have a restaurant on site?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rcm:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcn:"><div id="content-6" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Grace Bay Club has 4 restaurants: </p><ul class="dd2232e8aa"><li>Infiniti Restaurant &amp;amp</li><li> Raw Bar</li><li>The Grill</li><li>The Lounge</li><li>Krave</li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rcp:" id=":rco:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">What is there to do at Grace Bay Club?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rco:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcp:"><div id="content-7" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Grace Bay Club offers the following activities / services (charges may apply): </p><ul class="dd2232e8aa"><li>Spa and wellness centre</li><li>Hot tub/Jacuzzi</li><li>Fitness centre</li><li>Sauna</li><li>Massage</li><li>Cycling</li><li>Children's playground</li><li>Snorkelling</li><li>Diving</li><li>Fishing</li><li>Tennis court</li><li>Casino</li><li>Golf course (within 3 km)</li><li>Kids' club</li><li>Beachfront</li><li>Evening entertainment</li><li>Body wrap</li><li>Themed dinner nights</li><li>Beauty Services</li><li>Personal trainer</li><li>Entertainment staff</li><li>Live sport events (broadcast)</li><li>Tennis equipment</li><li>Water sport facilities on site</li><li>Spa lounge/relaxation area</li><li>Beach</li><li>Body treatments</li><li>Walking tours</li><li>Yoga classes</li><li>Cooking class</li><li>Horse riding</li><li>Bike tours</li><li>Steam room</li><li>Swimming pool</li><li>Manicure</li><li>Aerobics</li><li>Fitness</li><li>Happy hour</li><li>Body scrub</li><li>Live music/performance</li><li>Spa/wellness packages</li><li>Facial treatments</li><li>Spa facilities</li><li>Pedicure</li><li>Private beach area</li></ul></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rcr:" id=":rcq:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">How far is Grace Bay Club from the centre of Grace Bay?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rcq:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcr:"><div id="content-8" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Grace Bay Club is 113 km from the centre of Grace Bay.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rct:" id=":rcs:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">How close to the beach is Grace Bay Club?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rcs:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rct:"><div id="content-9" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>The nearest beach is just 50 m from Grace Bay Club.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rcv:" id=":rcu:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">Does Grace Bay Club have a hot tub for its guests?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rcu:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rcv:"><div id="content-10" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Yes, there is a hot tub. You can find out more about this and the other facilities at Grace Bay Club on this page.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div><hr class="f5a887a489 cca4521350" aria-hidden="true"><div itemscope="" itemprop="mainEntity" itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" class="e5e285812b"><div class=""><button class="cec0620c60" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls=":rd1:" id=":rd0:"><span class="d10f6911f7"><h3 itemprop="name" data-testid="question" class="e7addce19e">Is Grace Bay Club popular with families?</h3></span><span class="fc70cba028 e19912385b c2a70a5db2 bc7d708ceb" aria-hidden="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="50px"><path d="M19.268 8.913a.9.9 0 0 1-.266.642l-6.057 6.057A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 12 16c-.35.008-.69-.123-.945-.364L4.998 9.58a.91.91 0 0 1 0-1.284.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0L12 13.99l5.718-5.718a.897.897 0 0 1 1.284 0 .88.88 0 0 1 .266.642"></path></svg></span></button><div class="fd8f72d6ed" style="overflow: hidden;"><div aria-labelledby=":rd0:" role="region" class="f92d48f0f7" hidden="" id=":rd1:"><div id="content-11" itemscope="" itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer" itemprop="acceptedAnswer"><div itemprop="text" data-testid="answer" class="b99b6ef58f b4207c2ab6"><p>Yes, Grace Bay Club is popular with guests booking family stays.</p></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>

<a href="#" id="pipl-personalization-footer-btn" data-modal-id="personalisation-modal" data-component="privacy/personalisation-modal" data-modal-keep-mounted="true" data-modal-close-aria-label="Close" style="display:none;">
</a>
<template id="personalisation-modal" data-component="privacy/personalisation-modal" style="display: none !important;">
<header class="bui-modal__header">
<h2 class="bui-modal__title" id="modal-default-title" data-bui-ref="modal-title">
Personalised recommendations
</h2>
<p class="bui-modal__paragraph" id="modal-default-subtitle" data-bui-ref="modal-subtitle">
We provide personalised recommendations based on your activity on our platform. If you prefer, you can opt-out of this option. Keep in mind, opting-out only affects your current device. You must therefore adjust this setting on each device as necessary to reflect your preference.
</p>
</header>
<footer class="bui-modal__footer">
<div class="bui-switch">
<div class="bui-input-text__content">
<input type="checkbox" checked="checked" id="personalization-switch-1" class="bui-switch__trigger" aria-label="
Personalised recommendations
" aria-checked="true" role="switch">
<label for="personalization-switch-1" aria-hidden="true" class="bui-switch__hitbox" data-on-value="
Show personalised recommendations
" data-off-value="
Show personalised recommendations
">
<span class="bui-switch__indicator"></span>
</label>
</div>
</div>
</footer>
</template>
<style>
.rtl .bui-switch__trigger:checked + .bui-switch__hitbox .bui-switch__indicator:before,
[dir="rtl"] .bui-switch__trigger:checked + .bui-switch__hitbox .bui-switch__indicator:before {
transform: translate(calc(-1 * var(--bui_spacing_6x)));
}
</style>
<script type="text/javascript" nonce="">
(function () {
document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
if (e.target.id === 'personalization-switch-1') {
toggleSwitchLock(true);
var httpRequest = new XMLHttpRequest();
httpRequest.open('PUT', '/consent/personalization?value=' + (e.target.checked ? '0' : '1'), true);
httpRequest.onload = function () {
toggleSwitchLock(false);
B.require('events').trigger('privacy:personalisation-updated');
}
httpRequest.send();
}
});
function toggleSwitchLock(lock) {
var checkbox = document.getElementById('personalization-switch-1');
if (lock) {
checkbox.setAttribute('disabled', 'disabled');
} else {
checkbox.removeAttribute('disabled');
}
}
function trackCustomGoal(goal) {
if (window.B && window.B.et) {
window.B.et.customGoal('YTBeWfCDIXLSGbDaFSRfABNIPRaO', goal);
}
}
})();
</script>
</div>

<div id="revc_write_a_review_login_intro" style="display:none;" tabindex="-1">
<span class="invisible_spoken">Start of dialog content</span>
<div class="intro_header">
<h2 class="bui-modal__title">Verified reviews from real guests.</h2>
<p class="bui-modal__paragraph">We have more than 70 million property reviews, and they're all from <strong>real, verified guests</strong>.</p>
</div>
<div class="rlp-intro">
<div class="rlp-intro__container clearfix">
<h2 class="rlp-intro__title rlp-intro__a11y-exp-title">How does it work?</h2>
<ul class="rlp-intro-how a11y_contrast_blue_gray">
<li class="rlp-intro-how__item fl">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__container rlp-intro-how__container--tickfull">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__sub-container">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__num rlp-intro-how__num--tickfull">1</p>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__icon bicon-tickfull" aria-hidden="true"></p>
</div>
</div>
<h3 class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__a11y-exp-title">It starts with a booking</h3>
<span class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__caption">It starts with a booking</span>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__desc">The only way to leave a review is to first make a booking. That's how we know our reviews come from real guests who have stayed at the property.</p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__arrow fl" aria-hidden="true">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__arrow-icon bicon-rightchevron"></p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__item fl">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__container rlp-intro-how__container--citytrip">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__sub-container">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__num rlp-intro-how__num--citytrip">2</p>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__icon bicon-citytrip" aria-hidden="true"></p>
</div>
</div>
<h3 class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__a11y-exp-title">Followed by a trip</h3>
<span class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__caption">Followed by a trip</span>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__desc">When guests stay at the property they check out how quiet the room is, how friendly the staff are and more.</p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__arrow fl" aria-hidden="true">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__arrow-icon bicon-rightchevron"></p>
</li>
<li class="rlp-intro-how__item fl">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__container rlp-intro-how__container--feedback">
<div class="rlp-intro-how__sub-container">
<p class="rlp-intro-how__num rlp-intro-how__num--feedback">3</p>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__icon bicon-feedback" aria-hidden="true"></p>
</div>
</div>
<h3 class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__a11y-exp-title">And finally, a review</h3>
<span class="rlp-intro-how__title rlp-intro-how__caption">And finally, a review</span>
<p class="rlp-intro-how__desc">After their trip, guests tell us about their stay. We check for naughty words and verify the authenticity of all guest reviews before adding them to our site.</p>
</li>
</ul>
</div>
</div>
<p>If you booked through us and want to leave a review, please sign in first.</p>
<div class="intro_footer">
<a href="https://secure.booking.com/reviewtimeline.en-gb.html?label=gen173nr-10CAso2QFCDmdyYWNlLWJheS1jbHViSAlYBGhNiAEBmAEzuAEXyAEM2AED6AEB-AEBiAIBqAIBuAKx67_OBsACAdICJDEwZDU2YmJlLWNhNDYtNGVhYy05YzljLTM0YjZmZTM3M2VhNtgCAeACAQ&amp;sid=23cb3ca0bbb85d75c88ecddf9b7c2f86&amp;from_index_lightbox=1" class="revc_write_a_review_login_button">Sign in and leave a review</a>
</div>
<span class="invisible_spoken">End of dialog content</span>
</div>

<p id="calendar_check_out_title">Check-out date</p>
</div>

Current price {current_price_with_currency}.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_header":"AI Chat Terms of Use","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_intro":"These Terms of Use apply when you access or use Booking.com’s generative AI chat functionalities (“AI Chat”) that Booking.com makes available to you on our Platform. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms of Use, please do not interact with Booking.com’s AI Chat.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_intro_2":"Unless otherwise defined herein, all capitalised terms used in these Terms of Use have the same meaning as assigned to them in the Booking.com dictionary {start_link}here{end_link}.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_1":"{start_bold}1. Age Requirements.{end_bold} You must be 18 years of age or older to use the AI Chat.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_2":"{start_bold}2. Our use of Personal Data.{end_bold} You are not required to share any personal details or sensitive information about you or others (“Personal Data”) when interacting with the Booking.com AI Chat. However, if you choose to share any Personal Data with Booking.com’s AI Chat, Booking.com may use and combine that information with your search and booking history, previous trip information, as well as inferences we draw from your online behaviour on our Platform, to provide you with tailored responses to your questions, including based on your location (GPS and IP address). We may also use the above information to develop, train and fine-tune our AI systems and otherwise improve our products and services, although we deploy technical measures to limit the amount of disclosed Personal Data that we collect.\nIf you do not share any Personal Data when interacting with Booking.com’s AI Chat, we still use online identifiers, and your session and search history, to help answer your queries and manage open chat sessions so you can resume your session within a reasonable period.\nIn order to interact with you, Booking.com's AI Chat will share your questions with third party providers that power and support the provision of the AI Chat.\nWhen interacting with Booking.com’s AI Chat, please don’t share any information about yourself or others that you don’t want Booking.com to retain, use and share. \nRead our {start_link_1}Privacy Statement{end_link_1} to learn more about how Booking.com processes Personal Data and how you can exercise your privacy rights (see {start_link_2}How we use artificial intelligence and make automated decisions{end_link_2}).","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_3":"{start_bold}3. Machine Generated Output.{end_bold} Please be aware that all the responses you receive are machine-generated and not written by a human. These responses may contain errors. While some of the output is based on content available on Booking.com (see section 5 below), the responses are generally based on publicly available information (the accuracy of which has not been verified by Booking.com) provided by a third party service provider, as well as information you, other travelers and our partners provide. Note that responses might provide content or refer to services that are not available on Booking.com. You are interacting with AI designed to provide automated responses based on your input. The output does not necessarily represent Booking.com’s views and should not be attributed to Booking.com. While Booking.com’s AI Chat has been trained on a vast amount of data and can generate realistic responses, it is not capable of independent thought or decision-making and can generate unexpected and inaccurate responses. Please keep this in mind as you use the AI Chat.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_4":"{start_bold}4. Continuous Improvement.{end_bold} We are committed to continuously improving the AI Chat to enhance the user experience. As part of this ongoing effort, you may notice that certain features or functionalities may change over time. This could mean that features you have previously accessed may no longer be available, or you may encounter new or modified features. While we strive to provide a consistent user experience, these updates are part of our goal to improve our offerings. Please note that your experience may differ slightly depending on the version or updates you are using.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_5":"{start_bold}5. Recommendations.{end_bold} All the Travel Experience recommendations you will see are generated by Booking.com and can be booked on Booking.com, subject to availability. To see all the booking options of a recommendation, just click on the carousel card. We recommend that you check the information on your selected option prior to booking. Please note that we only provide the AI Chat for private use (including for leisure and business travel) and you agree not to use it for any commercial purposes. \nThe AI Chat leverages the recommendation system described in our How we work (HWW) page {start_link}here{end_link} in the relevant section E. under each Travel Experience. The recommendations we show are relevant to you based on your search criteria (the questions you ask in this interface) and other factors, as described in the HWW page. We use AI to interpret your search criteria and match with the most relevant recommendations. If you click on one of the recommendations in the carousel, you will be redirected to the search results on our Platform. Your selected recommendation will be pinned at the top of the search results and the default ranking and sorting options will apply to the rest of the results shown below the pinned recommendation, which are also described in the relevant section E. in our HWW page.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6":"{start_bold}6. Content.{end_bold} Users of Booking.com’s AI Chat are solely responsible for the content and information they share with the AI Chat and the decisions they make based on the information provided by the AI Chat. By interacting with the AI Chat, you’re confirming that, in respect of the content and information you share with the AI Chat:","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6_part_2":"Booking.com may moderate your content in accordance with its {start_link}Content standards and guidelines{end_link}.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6_part_3":"All input into, output from, and recommendations, feedback, comments, ideas, proposals and suggestions for improvements on the AI Chat may be used by us for any commercial purposes without restriction or compensation to you. As between users of the AI Chat and Booking.com, Booking.com owns all rights (including all intellectual property rights) in and to the AI Chat and, to the extent permitted by applicable law, the content and information generated via Booking.com’s AI Chat.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6a":"a. you're allowed to share it with us;","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6b":"b. it doesn't contain any viruses;","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6c":"c. it doesn't infringe the privacy or proprietary rights of others;","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6d":"d. you accept full responsibility for any legal claims against Booking.com related to it;","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6e":"e. we're allowed to use it in relation to further commercial purposes, including in a promotional context and to build, customise, provide or enhance our existing and future products and services; and","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_6f":"f. it complies with Booking.com’s {start_link}Content standards and guidelines{end_link}.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_7":"{start_bold}7. Disclaimer and Warranties.{end_bold} Booking.com’s AI Chat is provided \"as is\" and we don’t make any promises about the AI Chat or the content generated via the AI Chat, including in relation to merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, satisfactory quality or non-infringement. We do not promise that the AI Chat or the information and recommendations provided by it will be uninterrupted, appropriate, accurate, error-free or that they otherwise meet your expectations; or that any content processed or generated by the AI Chat will be secure, not lost or altered. In some countries, you may have rights and guarantees under laws and regulations that no company’s terms can overrule and nothing in this section is intended to exclude those rights or guarantees.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_8":"{start_bold}8. Liability.{end_bold} The use of the AI Chat is subject to section A19. Limitation of liability in the Booking.com {start_link}Customer Terms of Service{end_link}.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_june2025_section_9":"{start_bold}9. General.{end_bold} The Booking.com {start_link_1}Customer Terms of Service{end_link_1} (including Section A20 (Applicable law and forum)) and Booking.com {start_link_2}Privacy Statement{end_link_2} also apply to your use of the AI Chat.\nThese Terms of Use may be updated from time to time. If these updates are substantial, particularly relevant to you or impact your data protection rights, we will get in touch with you and notify you of the changes. However, we recommend that you visit these Terms of Use regularly to stay up to date with any other updates.","aitp_chat_legal_disclaimer_section_end":"These Terms of Use may be updated from time to time. This price does not include any additional fees which may apply, including, but not limited to, local taxes and variations in currency exchange rates.","low_rates":"Low rates","no_booking_fees":"No booking fees","pd_pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_5_6_legal_update":"If the other offer is part of a loyalty or rewards programme. We define this type of other offer as any situation where a customer gets a reduced price from a property or other website as a reward for repeat business, logging in, entering a coupon code, referring other customers, or performing any other action which then changes the initially shown price.","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_1":"The other offer must be for the same property and accommodation type.","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_2":"The other offer must be for the same check in and check out dates.","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_3":"The other offer must have the same cancellation policy and conditions.","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_4":"If the other offer is on a website that doesn’t reveal the property or accommodation type you’ll be staying in until after booking.","pdi_index_popup_wpm_bullet_bbasic":"If your current Booking.com booking is a Partner offer, i.e. an offer that's labelled as 'Partner Offer' on our platform (these offers are made available by Booking.com partner companies) or if you're comparing the other offer with one of these Partner Offers on our platform.","pdi_index_popup_wpm_checklist_contact_2":"You'll need to provide us with the link to the other offer and it must be online and available when we check. ","pdi_index_popup_wpm_contact":"Just remember to contact us after booking with us and at least 24 hours before your check-in date.","pdi_index_wpm_popup_cant_claim":"When can't you make a claim?","pdi_index_wpm_popup_checklist":"We Price Match checklist","pdi_index_wpm_popup_desc":"{startBold}You can claim a refund for the difference if you happen to find your reservation cheaper on another website.{endBold} ","pp_bpg_fancy_tooltip_found_cheaper":"Find cheaper? We'll refund the difference!","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_1":"Found your booking cheaper elsewhere?","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_2":"Look for {start_format}Found this room cheaper elsewhere?{end_format} on your confirmation page or in {start_format}View all bookings{end_format}.","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_3":"No account? Log in with your booking number and pin.","pp_index_popup_bpg_how_to_4":"You can also contact our {start_link}Customer Care{end_link} team.","pp_index_usp_we_price_match":"We Price Match","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_1":"Look for ‘Found this room cheaper elsewhere?’ on your confirmation page.","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_2":"Validate that the cheaper offer meets all the requirements (review checklist).","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_3":"Save the link to the cheaper offer (Example: www.hotel.com/93203920).","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_4":"Take a screenshot (or multiple) making sure all the relevant data is captured (review checklist).","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_5":"Contact Customer Service.","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_6":"After claim validation, we will amend the reservation price (if possible) or provide further instruction for you to claim an after stay refund of the price difference.","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_7":"Booking.com reserves the right to make the sole determination regarding a customer's eligibility to receive the price match.","vm_wpm_popup_cheaper_elsewhere_header":"Found your booking cheaper dates.","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_3":"The other offer must have the same cancellation policy and conditions.","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_4":"The other offer must be for the same number of occupants","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_5":"The other offer must have the same add-on / meal plan.","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_6":"The better deal must be in the local currency of the property.","vm_wpm_popup_checklist_header":"We Price Match checklist","vm_wpm_popup_desc_1":"{startBold}You can claim a refund for the difference if you happen to find your reservation cheaper on another website.{endBold} ","vm_wpm_popup_desc_2":"Just remember to contact us after booking with us. If you file your We Price Match claim via email, you'll need to provide us with a screenshot and a link to the other offer. You can also file a We Price Match claim directly on the phone by reaching out to our Customer Service. In any case, the other offer must be online and available when we check.","vm_wpm_popup_header":"We Price Match","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_1":"If the other offer is on a website that doesn’t reveal the property or accommodation type you’ll be staying in until after booking.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_2":"If the other offer is available on an opaque, suspicious and/or likely to be fraudulent website.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_3":"If the other offer is part of a loyalty or rewards program, where the price is reduced by the property or website for actions like repeat business, logging in, using a coupon code, referring others, or any other action that reduces the original price.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_4":"If your current Booking.com reservation is a ‘Partner offer’ (these are labelled as such on our platform and are provided by partner companies) or if you're comparing the other offer to a ‘Partner Offer’ on our platform.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_5":"If you cancel your booking.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_6":"If you book a single-unit property, which by nature cannot be available elsewhere.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_7":"Booking.com reserves the right to make the sole determination regarding a customer's eligibility to receive the price match.","vm_wpm_popup_no_claim_header":"When can't you make a claim?","a11y_sr_close_banner":"Tap to close message","bhqc_guest_feedback_loop_17":"{b_companyname} rated the quality of this property as {property_rating} out of 5 based on factors such as facilities, size, location and services provided.\n","bhqc_sr_qc_desc_tooltip_affiliate":"This property is rated {num_rating} out of 5 as compared to other homes and apartments on our site. rating – based on {num_reviews} review","other":"{num_score} rating – based on {num_reviews} reviews"}},"web_fame_guaranteed_cot_always_av_free":"Free cot always available","a11y_ugc_web_mdot_guidelines_close":"Close review guidelines","a11y_ugc_web_mdot_guidelines_open":"Open review guidelines","guest_reviews_disclaimer":"The guest reviews express the personal opinions of {b_companyname} customers who filled out a questionnaire after their stay at the hotel. These opinions do not necessarily represent the views of {b_companyname}.","mdot_ugc_review_guidelines_entry_point":"See our Review Guidelines","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_10":"{start_style}Contributions should be travel related.{end_style} The most helpful contributions are detailed and help others make better decisions. Please don’t include personal, political, ethical, or religious commentary. Promotional content will be removed and issues concerning {b_companyname}’s services should be routed to our Customer Service or Accommodation Service teams.","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_11":"{start_style}Contributions should be appropriate for a global audience.{end_style} Please avoid using profanity or attempts to approximate profanity with creative spelling, in any language. Comments and media that include 'hate speech', discriminatory remarks, threats, sexually explicit remarks, violence, and the promotion of illegal activity are not permitted. ","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_12":"{start_style}All content should be genuine and unique to the guest.{end_style} Reviews are most valuable when they are original and unbiased. Your contribution should be yours. {b_companyname} property partners should not post on behalf of guests or offer incentives in exchange for reviews. Attempts to bring down the rating of a competitor by submitting a negative review will not be tolerated.","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_13_new":"{start_bold}Respect the privacy of others{end_bold} – refrain from including personal data, such as first and last names, telephone numbers, email addresses and other information regarding other persons in your posts.","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_13_new1":"{start_bold}Respect intellectual property{end_bold} – ensure that you own or have the right to use any intellectual property rights that might exist in the content you post, particularly images.","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_14":"{start_style}The opinions expressed in contributions are those of {b_companyname} customers and properties and not of {b_companyname}. {b_companyname} does not accept responsibility or liability for any reviews or responses. {b_companyname} is a distributor (without any obligation to verify) and not a publisher of these comments and responses.{end_style}","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_5_b":"By default, reviews are sorted based on the date of the review and on additional criteria to display the most relevant reviews, including but not limited to: your language, reviews with text, and non-anonymous reviews. Additional sorting options may be available (by type of traveller, by score, etc.).","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_8":"{start_style}Guidelines and standards for Reviews{end_style}","reviews_ugc_vision_principles_update_9":"These guidelines and standards aim to keep the content on {b_companyname} relevant and family-friendly without limiting expression of strong opinions. They are also applicable regardless of the sentiment of the comment. ","ugc_reviews_disclaimer_translations":"This service may contain translations powered by Google. Google disclaims all warranties related to the translations, express or implied, including any warranties of accuracy, reliability, and any implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose and non-infringement.","ugc_reviews_disclaimer_translations_header":"Translations disclaimer","ugcd_rb_real_review_v1":"We moderate 100% of our reviews for authenticity.","ugcd_rb_real_review_v2":"All reviews have been moderated for authenticity.","ugcd_rb_real_review_v3":"We moderate all guest reviews in real time.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body1":"Each review score is between 1-10. To get the overall score that you see, we add up all the review scores we’ve received and divide that total by the number of review scores we’ve received. We use a weighted review system which means that the more recent the review, the bigger the impact on the total review score calculation. In addition, guests can give separate ‘subscores’ in crucial areas, such as location, cleanliness, staff, comfort, facilities, value for money and free Wi-Fi. Note that guests submit their subscores and their overall scores independently, so there’s no direct link between them.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body2":"You can review an Accommodation that you booked through our Platform if you stayed there or if you arrived at the property but didn’t actually stay there. To edit a review you’ve already submitted, please contact our Customer Service team.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body3":"We have people and automated systems that specialise in detecting fake reviews submitted to our Platform. If we find any, we delete them and, if necessary, take action against whoever is responsible.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body4":"Anyone else who spots something suspicious can always report it to our Customer Service team, so our Fraud team can investigate.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body5":"Ideally, we would publish every review we receive, whether positive or negative. However, we won’t display any review that includes or refers to (among other things):","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body6":"To make sure reviews are relevant, we may only accept reviews that are submitted within 3 months of checking out, and we may stop showing reviews once they’re 36 months old – or if the Accommodation has a change of ownership.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body7":"An Accommodation may choose to reply to a review.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body8":"When you see multiple reviews, the most recent ones will be at the top, subject to a few other factors (what language a review is in, whether it’s just a rating or contains comments as well, etc.). If you like, you can sort and/or filter them (by time of year, review score, etc.).","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_body9":"We sometimes show external review scores from other well-known travel websites. We make it clear when we’ve done this.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet1":"Politically sensitive comments","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet2":"Promotional content","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet3":"Illegal activities","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet4":"Personal or sensitive information (e.g. emails, phone numbers or credit card fake content","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet7":"Animal cruelty","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet8":"Impersonation (e.g. if the writer is claiming to be someone else)","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_bullet9":"Any violation of our {start_link}review guidelines{end_link}.","ugcx_review_guidelines_new_header":"How guest reviews See {start_link}the fine print{end_link} to read more about this property.","a11y_st_banner_cert_name":"Certification name","a11y_st_cert_modal_close":"Back to accommodation details","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_header":"Sustainability","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h1":"Third-party sustainability certifications","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h1_body":"At Booking.com, we are committed to making more sustainable travel easier for everyone. As part of this commitment, we highlight properties with third-party sustainability certifications.","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h2":"How does it work?","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h2_body":"A label saying ‘Sustainability certification’ is shown next to properties that have had their sustainability efforts certified by a third party that we recognise. For the initial phase of our programme, we prioritised recognising well-respected certifications, including certifications recognised by the Global Sustainable Tourism Council (GSTC), the Swisstainable programme list, certifications that declared compliance with the Travalyst criteria, and well-renowned certifications at a global level, such as ISO, BREEAM and LEED. This work was supported by an independent study commissioned by Booking.com.","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h3":"What does it mean for me?","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h3_body":"Properties that have achieved these certifications have worked to specific criteria to deliver a more sustainable stay for guests like you. Please ask the property directly to find out about the sustainability actions it's taking.","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h4":"How can I find more sustainable properties?","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_modal_h4_body":"You can filter for properties with certifications using the ‘Sustainability certification’ filter in your search results. You’ll also be able to find these properties with a dedicated ‘Sustainability certification’ label.","st_cert_desktop_mdot_pp_subheader":{"type":"plural","plural":{"one":"This property has {num} third-party sustainability certification. {start_link}Learn more about certifications{end_link}","other":"This property has {num} third-party sustainability certifications. {start_link}Learn more about certifications{end_link}"}},"sustainability_certification_subheader":"Certified by:","location_hp_surrounding_public_transport_bus":"Bus","location_hp_surrounding_public_transport_metro":"Metro","location_hp_surrounding_public_transport_train":"Train","seo_city_hotel_lp_surroundings_block_header":"Hotel surroundings","surroundings_block_header":"Property surroundings","surroundings_category_bar_no_colon":"Cafe/bar","surroundings_category_forest":"Forest","surroundings_category_lake_no_colon":"Lake","surroundings_category_mountain_no_colon":"Mountain","surroundings_category_peak":"Peak","surroundings_category_restaurant_no_colon":"Restaurant","surroundings_category_river_no_colon":"River","surroundings_category_sea_no_colon":"Sea/ocean","surroundings_category_waterfall":"Waterfall","hp_amenities_header_block":"{start_facilities_style}Amenities{end_facilities_style} of {b_hotel_name}","hp_facilities_header_block":"{start_facilities_style}Facilities{end_facilities_style} of {b_hotel_name}","hp_great_facility_badge":"Great facilities! You can find more information about the host here: {start_link}see host details{end_link}.","dec_2023_dsa_guest_proff_host_entry_point_heading":"Legal information","dec_2023_mdot_dsa_guest_proff_host_desc":"This property is managed by a professional host. This label has no relevance in terms of tax, including VAT and other 'indirect taxes’, but is required under\u2028applicable consumer laws. {start_link}Learn more{end_link}.","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_body":"The contract for accommodation services entered into through {b_companyname} is made between you (the customer) and the service provider (i.e. the private host, professional host, or business entity) . The service provider, as a party to the contract, is responsible towards you for proper performance of the services. {b_companyname} is a platform through which third parties offer their services (“Service Providers”, including accommodation services) and it solely intermediates the contract between you and the Service Provider. Therefore, {b_companyname} is responsible for obligations related to providing the Platform, and Service Providers are responsible for obligations related to the accommodation services. {start_link}For examples of obligations of {b_companyname} and obligations of Service Providers click here.{end_link}","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_header":"Some examples of obligations of {b_companyname} are:","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_four":"make available a Customer Service center aimed at assisting consumers, in cases of problems connected with realisation of accommodation services, for example by contacting the service providers (however, this is a voluntary and facultative activity of {b_companyname} and {b_companyname} does not assume any obligations of accommodation providers).","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_one":"providing the functioning of the {b_companyname} service with reasonable professional diligence;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_three":"resolving your complaints connected with the operation of the {b_companyname} service;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_booking_examples_point_two":"managing your payment and ensuring the completion of your transaction with the Service Provider, as long as {b_companyname} facilitates your payment; ","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_header":"Some examples of obligations of Service Providers are:","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_point_one":"providing the accommodation (service) according to the contract between you and the Service Provider;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_point_three":"resolving your complaints connected with the availability and quality of the accommodation (e.g. overbooking, room standard, facilities or location).","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_sp_examples_point_two":"managing your payment, as long as the Service Provider accepts your payment directly;","ugc_uokik_obligations_split_title":"Split of obligations","a11y_desktop_roomlist_facilities_included_header":"Included {b_companyname} as a private host are parties that rent out their property or properties for purposes which are outside their trade, business, or profession. They are not officially traders (like a global hotel chain) and therefore may not fall under the same consumer protection rules under EU law, but don’t worry, {b_companyname} provides you with the same customer service as we do with any stay. This doesn’t mean that your stay or experience will be any different than booking with a professional host.","bh_sc_dsa_chains_legal_info_desc_bestwestern":"However, in the case of an accommodation, owned and/or operated by an independent third party, such third party and not the business listed below is committing to use reasonable efforts to comply with all applicable laws.","bh_sc_dsa_chains_legal_info_desc_choice":"In the case of franchised hotels, the operator or owner of the accommodation, not the business, is required to comply in all material respects with all applicable laws where they are incorporated.","bh_sc_dsa_chains_legal_info_desc_hyatt":"In the case of franchised hotels, the operator of the accommodation, where this party is different from the business, has committed to use reasonable efforts to comply with all applicable laws where they are incorporated.","bh_sc_dsa_chains_legal_info_desc_marriott":"In the case of franchised hotels, the operator of the accommodation, where this party is different from the business, has committed to use reasonable efforts to comply with all applicable laws where they are incorporated.","bh_sc_dsa_chains_legal_info_desc_wyndham":"This accommodation is franchised and/or owned or operated by an independent third party and is a different party than the business listed below. This accommodation, and not the business mentioned below, is committing to use reasonable efforts to comply with all applicable laws.","bh_sc_dsa_chains_legal_info_modal_body":"A ‘business’ is typically either a party that makes their accommodation(s) bookable on our platform as their primary trade or as a significant secondary source of income, or a party that has contracted with Booking.com for the benefit of a group of accommodations that are owned or operated by independent third parties (such as a hotel chain or a property manager managing a large portfolio of vacation rentals). This accommodation operates under a brand owned, licensed or represented by the business mentioned below. Please note that the accommodation itself that you may book is responsible for your stay. Therefore, please check your booking confirmation for the accommodation’s specific details, including its address. The property itself may have different details. The property's details, including its address, will be shared in the booking confirmation. We can add 1 rollaway bed should the guest desire.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"1 October 2019","roomId":36238001,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":3737465,"question":"Is your resort adults only?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"16 July 2020","answer":"Our Resort has multiple sections.    Main Hotel building Adults only with adults only pool an Jazuzzi.   There is also a family section and the Uber Luxe Estate section.\n\nAngella","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"27 July 2020","roomId":36238001,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":1218190,"question":"Is your private beach next to the property or do I need to use a means of transportation to go there?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"6 September 2019","answer":"We are a beachfront property.   All suites directly face the ocean and so guests are only some steps away from the sand.  Transfers are not required.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"1 October 2019","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":31449267,"question":"I saw above that you do offer a meal plan for lunch and dinner at cost. We are looking to reserve your largest suite.\nBest, \nMary","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"9 October 2022","answer":"The meal plan is not longer being offered at this time.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"14 January 2023","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":32834318,"question":"Hello - can a Villa junior suite accommodate 3 people? do you have any other room configurations that can accommodate 5 people in 2 rooms? thanks","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"28 November 2022","answer":"The Villa Junior suite is ideal for 2 guests only as it is only 626 square feet. The resort has 4 restaurants and offers Al La Carte options.    We do however offer a meal plan with Lunch and dinner for a minimum of 3 nights at a cost.   Our Meal Plan does not include alcoholic beverages.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"25 October 2019","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":1012490,"question":"When is the best time to visit your property for the perfect beach holiday?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"6 September 2019","answer":"The Turks and Caicos has beautiful weather year round and is always great for vacation.     ","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"1 October 2019","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":8878105,"question":"Can we book the Villas Junior Suite for 2 people and a baby under 1?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"15 April 2021","answer":"Certainly!   We can add a crib as needed.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"10 May 2021","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":42715956,"question":"Do you have 3 bedroom suites","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"12 February 2024","answer":"Hello,\n\nYes, we do have 3-bedroom suites on property.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"30 July 2024","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":17802753,"question":"Hi I'm looking to come on my own and I see that the booking will be non refundable, I will need a covid test to come, what if I test positive and need to cancel, will I lose all my money? \nAlso what is an extra-large double bed?","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"3 November 2021","answer":"Hello.       We do encourage guests to purchase travel insurance should something happen.  \nWhen are you planning on traveling? Thank you for your support.\nKindly indicate the dates and names of guests and we would check availability and assign as requested once we have space available.\n\nAngella\n\n","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"25 October 2021","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":44133628,"question":"What is the dept feet of the water in the pool , and is there a spa on the property","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"17 April 2024","answer":"Hello,\n\nWe do have a spa on property. ","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"30 July 2024","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":17563042,"question":"How close is your resort to the main town and Village shopping centre","translatedQuestion":null,"askedTimestamp":"27 October 2021","answer":"We are within 5 minutes walking distance of the Grace Bay Town area.\nThe town has many bars, restaurants, and shopping.","translatedAnswer":null,"answeredTimestamp":"13 November 2021","roomId":null,"showTranslations":false},{"__typename":"PropertyQuestionAnswerPair","questionId":29939114,"question":"Do all of your Junior Suites have King size beds? This spacious apartment comprises 1 living room, 5 separate bedrooms and 6 bathrooms with a bath and free toiletries. Guests will find a stovetop, a refrigerator, a dishwasher and kitchenware in the kitchen. The apartment also provides guests with a barbecue. The air-conditioned apartment provides a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a tea and coffee maker, a seating area, a safe deposit box as well as sea views. The unit offers 5 apartment's special features are the pool with a view and the hot tub. Boasting a private entrance, this air-conditioned apartment features 2 living rooms, 9 separate bedrooms and 10 bathrooms with a bath and a shower. Guests will find a stovetop, a refrigerator, a dishwasher and kitchenware in the well-fitted kitchen. The apartment also comes with a barbecue. The spacious apartment features a washing machine, a tea and coffee maker, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, as well as sea views. The unit has 16 Oasis","description":"The pool with a view and hot tub are the special features of this villa. Boasting a private entrance, this air-conditioned villa includes 3 living rooms, 14 separate bedrooms and 16 bathrooms with a bath and a shower. Guests will find a stovetop, a refrigerator, a dishwasher and kitchenware in the well-fitted kitchen. The villa also features a barbecue. The spacious villa offers a washing machine, a tea and coffee maker, a seating area, a flat-screen TV with cable channels, as well as sea views. The unit has 19 Boasting a private entrance, this spacious apartment also includes 6 bedrooms, a seating area and 7 bathrooms with a bath and a shower. Guests will find a stovetop, a refrigerator, a dishwasher and kitchenware in the well-equipped kitchen. The apartment also features a barbecue. The air-conditioned apartment offers a flat-screen TV with cable channels, a washing machine, a tea and coffee maker, a dining area as well as sea views. The unit has 8 "}},"PropertySustainability:{}":{"__typename":"PropertySustainability","isSustainable":false,"certifications":null},"TripTypesHotelPage:{}":{"__typename":"TripTypesHotelPage","nearbySkiLifts":null,"beaches":[{"__typename":"BeachDataForHotelPage","beachId":9977,"name":"Grace Bay Beach","photoUrl":null,"localizedDistanceFormatted":"40 m","reviewScore":9.7,"reviewScoreFormatted":"9.7"},{"__typename":"BeachDataForHotelPage","beachId":4571356,"name":"Pelican Beach","photoUrl":null,"localizedDistanceFormatted":"2 km","reviewScore":9.2,"reviewScoreFormatted":"9.2"},{"__typename":"BeachDataForHotelPage","beachId":4571353,"name":"Long Bay Beach","photoUrl":null,"localizedDistanceFormatted":"2.3 km","reviewScore":9.2,"reviewScoreFormatted":"9.2"}],"closestTopBeach":{"__typename":"BeachDataForHotelPage","beachId":9977,"name":"Grace Bay Beach","reviewScore":9.7,"reviewScoreFormatted":"9.7"}},"PropertyTripTypeLabelsInfo:{}":{"__typename":"PropertyTripTypeLabelsInfo","isSkiSeason":false,"enabledDestinationLabels":["BEACH_UFI"],"enabledPropertyLabels":["HAS_FREE_PRIVATE_BEACH","HAS_PRIVATE_BEACH","BEACH_FRONT","HAS_BEACH"]},"HotelTranslation:{}":{"__typename":"HotelTranslation","name":"Grace Bay Club","description":"This impressive resort is located on Grace Bay Beach, on Providenciales, part of the Turks and Caicos Islands. It offers an extensive spa, 3 outdoor pools and a private beach area.\n\nThe stylish, air-conditioned suites at Grace Bay Club feature free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV, DVD player and iPod docking station. Each one has a private terrace with ocean views.\n\nThe resort features  Infiniti Restaurant \u0026 Raw Bar, where guests enjoy fine dining on dishes with fresh, local ingredients, while The Grill and Krave Restaurants offer international dishes in an informal environment. There is also a pool bar and an infinity bar which stretches right to the ocean.\n\nThe Anani Spa offers a range of fitness and massage treatments. There is also a fitness centre and tennis courts. For children there is the Kids’ Town, which offers entertainment, arts and crafts.\n\nThere is a golf course just 2 minutes’ drive from Grace Bay Club, and the nearby beaches are great for scuba diving and other water sports. Providenciales Airport is 12 minutes’ drive away.\n\n","markupDescription":null,"finePrint":null,"metadata":null},"ContentTranslation:HOTEL/DESCRIPTION_EXP_AUTOGEN_HW_GOOGLE_MT_MANY_LANGS@362380":{"__typename":"ContentTranslation","id":"HOTEL/DESCRIPTION_EXP_AUTOGEN_HW_GOOGLE_MT_MANY_LANGS@362380","name":"This impressive resort is located on Grace Bay Beach, on Providenciales, part of the Turks and Caicos Islands. It offers an extensive spa, 3 outdoor pools and a private beach area.\n\nThe stylish, air-conditioned suites at Grace Bay Club feature free Wi-Fi, a flat-screen TV, DVD player and iPod docking station. Each one has a private terrace with ocean views.\n\nThe resort features  Infiniti Restaurant \u0026 Raw Bar, where guests enjoy fine dining on dishes with fresh, local ingredients, while The Grill and Krave Restaurants offer international dishes in an informal environment. There is also a pool bar and an infinity bar which stretches right to the ocean.\n\nThe Anani Spa offers a range of fitness and massage treatments. There is also a fitness centre and tennis courts. For children there is the Kids’ Town, which offers entertainment, arts and crafts.\n\nThere is a golf course just 2 minutes’ drive from Grace Bay Club, and the nearby beaches are great for scuba diving and other water sports. Providenciales Airport is 12 minutes’ drive away.\n\n"},"Link:accommodations":{"__typename":"Link","id":"accommodations","label":"Stays","url":"https://www.booking.com/index.en-gb.html?aid=304142\u0026label=gen173nr-10CAso2QFCDmdyYWNlLWJheS1jbHViSAlYBGhNiAEBmAEzuAEXyAEM2AED6AEB-AEBiAIBqAIBuAKx67_OBsACAdICJDEwZDU2YmJlLWNhNDYtNGVhYy05YzljLTM0YjZmZTM3M2VhNtgCAeACAQ\u0026selected_currency=EUR\u0026sid=701ee012eb1e89b6e8f3d54b99d28371\u0026","icon":"building_house"},"Link:flights":{"__typename":"Link","id":"flights","label":"Flights","url":"https://booking.com/pxgo?lang=en-gb\u0026token=UmFuZG9tSVYkc2RlIyh9YaAHsRE_5bn3XAdrro9oXVrWjk7sIVWfQA_WTHWwiN9gGSKd4DmXIEswCLhRlNwsFPSXvdNrsoO6RbjhkHwLq7DCuI-o7Arz6-msB0KHgX3V3dC2TSyMpI57znCsgfiUxKesD9O3AOv4ClWHT8DA04TdjG3P9_BWwIiGJBRtl9wQHHEKXNhcr47Aon0bBN2DukBGSPUjm_tiUtVpHs3pAafWED9At73PqZF-sOGiY8HoFzlE4jhl4ZpPnVRjW83f5yYfEb3YV5D8_Ec4tqujA7h_G2ODZkwdlkmWH08hCYSH20C5Um69i0nu2T_nXJMmOCF3ADWq9HME83akp0Agnwvk6MXC7rb_YX0qjaKVCG_oAcNGU-Go1gVuEAO8HCe0GIpLRdC0iWYIPyIErcbnfqT7mD1R7NPaziax5RDllysWa1FOLFgTEW7yiJwUrW7aS9SY5NfIsQBad_VOsdjLSZaVmzMia8miQM-Bo__0BHD1VMZTjhIlIc4il0XK-DUMsg\u0026label=gen173nr-10CAso2QFCDmdyYWNlLWJheS1jbHViSAlYBGhNiAEBmAEzuAEXyAEM2AED6AEB-AEBiAIBqAIBuAKx67_OBsACAdICJDEwZDU2YmJlLWNhNDYtNGVhYy05YzljLTM0YjZmZTM3M2VhNtgCAeACAQ\u0026url=https%3A%2F%2Fbooking.kayak.com%2Fin%3Fsid%3D701ee012eb1e89b6e8f3d54b99d28371%26mc%3DEUR%26bdclc%3Den-gb%26p%3Dsearchbox_link%26a%3Dbdc%252Fsearchbox\u0026aid=304142","icon":"airplane"},"Link:packages":{"__typename":"Link","id":"packages","label":"Flight                 animation-timing-function: ease-out;
                animation-fill-mode: forwards;
                animation-duration: 1000ms;animation-name: slide-down-custom;bottom: -99px;"><div role="dialog" aria-label="Manage cookie settings"><div class="ot-sdk-container"><div class="ot-sdk-row"><div id="onetrust-group-container" class="ot-sdk-eight ot-sdk-columns"><div class="banner_logo"></div><div id="onetrust-policy"><h2 id="onetrust-policy-title">Manage cookie settings</h2><div id="onetrust-policy-text" tabindex="0"><p>When you use Booking.com, we (Booking.com and our partners) use the following categories of cookies (and similar technologies) that require your consent: analytical cookies and marketing cookies.</p>
<h3>Analytical cookies</h3>
<p id="ot-analytical-cookies-p">We and our partners use analytical cookies to gain information on how you use our service, which is then used to understand how visitors like you use our platform and to improve the performance of our site and services.</p>
<h3>Marketing cookies</h3>
<p id="ot-marketing-cookies-p">We and our partners use marketing cookies, including social media cookies, to collect information about your behaviour on this platform that helps us decide which products to show you on and off our platform, and to display personalised content and advertisements on Booking.com and other platforms. The personalised content is based on your behaviour and the services you've booked. These cookies also allow you to share or like pages on social media.</p>


<p>By selecting 'Accept', you consent to the use of analytical and marketing cookies and the related processing of your personal data. You can update your consent for each platform at any time. For the website, through 'Manage cookie settings' in the footer; for the app, through 'My account' &gt; 'Privacy and data management' &gt; 'Privacy settings'.</p>
<p>By selecting 'Decline', you will be provided with a less personalised experience on our platform.</p><p>You can find more information about relevant processing of personal data in the <a href="https://www.booking.com/content/privacy.html" target="_blank">Privacy Notice</a>.</p></div></div></div><div id="onetrust-button-group-parent" class="ot-sdk-three ot-sdk-columns has-reject-all-button"><div id="onetrust-button-group"><button id="onetrust-pc-btn-handler" class="cookie-setting-link">Manage settings</button> <button id="onetrust-reject-all-handler">Decline</button> <button id="onetrust-accept-btn-handler">Accept</button></div></div></div></div><!-- Close Button --><div id="onetrust-close-btn-container"></div><!--
